challenge.title: Korak 9
challenge.description:
Poslednja izmena će biti u tekstu e-maila unutar aplikacije. U prethodnim lekcijama i radionicama, naučili ste kako da radite sa vezom mailto na ovaj način:

<p>Email me at <a href="mailto:janedoe@email.com">janedoe@email.com</a></p>

Počnite obuhvaćanjem adrese e-pošte camperbot@blog.io unutar elementa sidra (anchor). Zatim, dodajte atribut elementu href na anker element i postavite ga jednak vrednosti mailto:camperbot@blog.io.

Sa tim poslednjim promenama, uspešno ste rešili sve probleme na stranici bloga!

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Camperbot's Blog

Navigation

  • My Journey
  • Accessibility
  • Next Steps

My Journey Learning to Code

I started learning to code a few months ago and it's been a wild ride!

Early Challenges

At first, syntax was really confusing.

Breakthroughs

Eventually things started to click.

Accessibility Matters

Today I learned that not everyone uses the web the same way I do.

Screen Readers

These tools help visually impaired users browse websites.

What's Next?

I'm excited to dive into JavaScript and build interactive features!

Coming soon: My first JavaScript project!

Stay tuned for some exciting interactive blog features.

Contact Me

Email me at camperbot@blog.io

tests.text: Vaša e-mail adresa za camperbot@blog.io treba da se obavije unutar sekcije sidra.
Vaš anker element mora imati svojstvo elemenata href sa vrednošću mailto:camperbot@blog.io.
